Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.0, showing extraordinary returns across all timeframes—particularly its 1,411.6% 10-year return and 539.79% 5-year return—while maintaining "strong_buy" signal status with all four major moving averages above price (sma_all: true). ISSC follows closely with similarly impressive metrics, including a 301.36% 1-year return that substantially outpaces SPY by 287.04 percentage points, though its 5-year momentum (ratio of 1.06) shows some deceleration compared to LINC's consistent acceleration pattern. Both securities pass 4 of 4 momentum ratio thresholds and exhibit confirmed volatility signals, suggesting sustained directional strength rather than speculative spikes. The correlation patterns indicate both names have moderate exposure to cyclical sectors (XLB and XLI) while remaining relatively uncorrelated with commodities and precious metals, positioning them as secular growth stories rather than inflation hedges.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
